title: Lil' Critters - A ZAWA Addon
description: Add a bit of ambiance to your zoo with these little critters!
body:
Looking for more ambiance within your zoo? Then this Zoo and Wild Animals addon is for you! With plans to add various small creatures to the game, all with their own custom models, textures, animations, sounds, and more!

**Latest version (1.16.5-1.0.2-TropEx3) requires ZAWA: Evolved 1.0.2-BeefBeta-TropicalExpedition3 for Minecraft 1.16.5!**



Want to join our little community? Come say hello in the ZAWA Addons official discord, where you can follow this mod's progress along with all the other addons! [https://discord.gg/dQZNqPukbu](https://discord.gg/dQZNqPukbu)
